title: Strategic Projects Associate
requirements_met: Research and analytical capabilities: data analytics, failure analysis at Amazon Alexa (98% success rate)
Strong written communication: content marketing, PR, investor updates
Organization and attention to detail: managed multiple workstreams at early-stage Minima
Ability to manage multiple priorities: cross-functional ownership across GTM, ops, community, fundraising
Independent problem-solving: brought structure to early-stage chaos without slowing execution
High ownership mentality: took ownership of whatever was necessary as first employee
gaps: No direct regulatory/compliance background (a preferred item)
In-office 6-7 days per week - intense commitment from Cambridge
Listed jointly with Chicago; confirm London headcount
preferred_met: Intellectual curiosity and rapid learning: self-taught AI agent building, multiple languages
Comfort navigating ambiguity: 6 years in early-stage startup environment
Cross-functional collaboration: worked across ops, product, marketing, fundraising

experience_fit.calculation: Generalist associate role; user mid-level founder-facing generalist is an exact fit = 15

industry_match.calculation: AI financial infrastructure company - genuine AI company = 15

location_match.calculation: London (also Chicago) in-person; user open to in-person London = 10

salary_penalty.reason: USD 125-200K well above user GBP 50K minimum

notes: Corgi Insurance (YC S24): AI financial infrastructure company rebuilding the insurance industry with AI. Strategic Projects Associate works on high-leverage cross-functional initiatives - strong founding-generalist fit.

must_haves.req: Location: based in Chicago, IL; in office 6-7 days/week
must_haves.note: Live Ashby API shows this role is Chicago-only (the only Corgi London role is Full Stack SW Engineer). Ryan is UK-only authorized; no US visa, no sponsorship mentioned

must_haves.req: Strong researcher and clear written communicator
Translate ambiguous problems into structured recommendations
must_haves.note: Founder-facing generalist; turned ambiguity into workstreams

must_haves.req: High ownership, manage multiple priorities, work through ambiguity

hard_blockers: Role is Chicago, US — Ryan has UK-only work authorization (verified JSON's 'London/Chicago' is inaccurate; live API = Chicago only)
met_strengths: Excellent functional/skills match for the work itself
interview_match.one_line_verdict: Skills match is outstanding but the role is Chicago-only with no sponsorship and Ryan is UK-authorized — a geographic/visa hard blocker screens him out despite the fit.
